title: Singapore MRT NSEWL Trains 4-Pack
description: This pack includes the Singapore MRT C151A, C151B, C151C, and C751B, retextured from the Minecraft Transit Railway mod's default C-Train.
body:
This pack requires **Minecraft Transit Railway**.

Contents:
- SMRT Trains C151A (regular and mini variants)
- SMRT Trains C151B (regular and mini variants)
- SMRT Trains C151C (regular and mini variants)
- SMRT Trains C751B (regular and mini variants)
